headlines.headline: Nerval Biopharma names new head of automated logistics division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a routine leadership change that typically has minimal immediate market impact.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
